rationale: Cites real domain knowledge but commits a critical jurisdictional error: applies GDPR to a US-only SaaS with no EU customers. Fails to identify the actual top regulatory risks for a US-only entity.
rubric_evidence: GDPR Article 6 (lawful basis) — Logging all keystrokes lacks a demonstrable lawful basis under GDPR's strict consent requirements
Because keystroke logging constitutes 'systematic monitoring of data subjects on a large scale', a Data Protection Impact Assessment is mandatory
applicant failed to note the company has no EU customers and is US-based, making GDPR inapplicable
